name: codepet
description: macOS desktop pet that reacts to Claude Code / Codex sessions
author: seongwon seo

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run bundle:renderer && npm run copy:assets
scripts.copy:assets: mkdir -p dist/renderer dist/assets && cp src/renderer/*.html dist/renderer/ && cp -R assets/. dist/assets/
